mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1) VALUES(board_seq.nextval, #{categoryno}, #{memberno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{passwd}, #{word}, sysdate, #{visible}, #{file1}, #{file1saved}, #{thumb1}, #{size1})
mapper.select: SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1 FROM board ORDER BY boardno DESC
SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1 FROM board WHERE boardno = #{boardno}
